case_title: SINGLETON,ANGELA L. VS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY SINGLETON,ANGELA L. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGLETON,ANGELA L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $620.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO MICHAEL KELLY RETURNED SIGNED.
